introduction_text:
This is where you can make an anonymous report, protected disclosure or whistleblower statement for the Company to investigate.

Please provide as much information as you possibly can, however know that your disclosure will be treated as anonymous.

All personal information gathered will be subject to our Privacy Policy and complies with the Protection of Personal Information Act, 2014.
name: anonymous-report
success_message: You have successfuly reported the Incident or Concern and we will investigate the issue immediately. Strict confidentiality will be applied.
title: Anonymous Report

web_form_fields.label: What is the Nature of the Report?
web_form_fields.options:
Fraud / Theft
Bribery / Corruption
Conflict of Interest
Financial Misconduct / Misstatement
Harassment / Discrimination
Labour / Human-Rights Abuse
Health and Safety Breach
Environmental Harm
Data Privacy / POPIA Breach
Cybersecurity / System Abuse
Retaliation Against Whistleblower
Other

web_form_fields.description: Please provide as much information as you can, feel free to attach evidence in the below table. Provide dates, names and any other information that you can which will enable us to action your concern.
web_form_fields.label: Detailed Description of Report / Incident / Concern
Contact Number of Person Making Report (Optional)
Email Address of Person Making Report (Optional)
Check here if you do not want to be Contacted
